exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"], "monto": [1.0]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="left")
print(len(m))

import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C001"]})
print(bool(cli["cliente_id"].is_unique))

import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C001", "C001"], "monto": [1, 2, 3]})
print(len(cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="inner")))

import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"], "monto": [1.0]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="left", indicator=True)
print(m.loc[m["_merge"] == "left_only", "cliente_id"].tolist())

import pandas as pd
a = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1], "x": [1]})
b = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1, 1], "y": [2, 3]})
try:
    a.merge(b, on="id", validate="one_to_one")
except Exception:
    print("fail")

import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"], "monto": [1.0]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="left", indicator=True)
print(int((m["_merge"] == "left_only").sum()))

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Cusco"], "mes": ["2024-01", "2024-01"], "monto": [1.0, 2.0]})
print(df.pivot(index="region", columns="mes", values="monto").shape)

import pandas as pd
wide = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima"], "2024-01": [10.0], "2024-02": [20.0]})
long = wide.melt(id_vars=["region"], var_name="mes", value_name="monto")
print(long.to_dict(orient="list"))

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"a": [1], "b": [2]})
print(df.stack().index.nlevels)

import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1, 2, 3], index=pd.MultiIndex.from_product([["Lima"], ["a", "b", "c"]]))
print(s.unstack().shape)

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Lima"], "mes": [1, 2], "monto": [1.0, 2.0]})
print(df.set_index(["region", "mes"]).index.names)

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima"], "mes": [1], "monto": [1.0]})
mi = df.set_index(["region", "mes"])
print(mi.reset_index().columns.tolist())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Lima", "Cusco"], "monto": [1.0, 2.0, 3.0]})
print(df.groupby("region")["monto"].sum().to_dict())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Lima"], "monto": [1.0, 3.0]})
df["mean_r"] = df.groupby("region")["monto"].transform("mean")
print(df["mean_r"].tolist())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Cusco"], "monto": [10.0, 5.0], "n": [2, 1]})
print(df.groupby("region").agg(monto_sum=("monto", "sum"), n=("n", "sum")).to_dict())

import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, 2.0, 3.0])
r = s.rolling(2).mean()
out = [None if pd.isna(x) else float(x) for x in r]
print(out)

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C001", "C002"], "fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-05", "2024-02-01", "2024-01-10"])})
df["cohort"] = df.groupby("cliente_id")["fecha"].transform("min").dt.to_period("M").astype(str)
print(df.drop_duplicates("cliente_id").set_index("cliente_id")["cohort"].to_dict())

import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, 3.0, 5.0], index=pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-01", "2024-01-02", "2024-01-03"]))
s = s.sort_index()
print(float(s.rolling(2).mean().iloc[-1]))

parts = [10.0, 20.0, 70.0]
total = 100.0
print(abs(sum(parts) - total) < 1e-9)

activos = 40
pagados = 10
print(pagados / activos)

total = 100
lima = 60
print(total - lima)

import pandas as pd
tx = pd.DataFrame({"fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-10", "2024-02-01"]), "monto": [10.0, 99.0]})
cutoff = pd.Timestamp("2024-01-31")
print(tx.loc[tx["fecha"] <= cutoff, "monto"].tolist())

import pandas as pd
tx = pd.DataFrame({"fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-10", "2024-02-01"]), "monto": [10.0, 99.0]})
cutoff = pd.Timestamp("2024-01-31")
pre = float(tx.loc[tx["fecha"] <= cutoff, "monto"].sum())
total = float(tx["monto"].sum())
print(total - pre)

import pandas as pd
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C001"], "fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-10", "2024-03-01"]), "monto": [10.0, 999.0]})
cutoff = pd.Timestamp("2024-01-31")
feat = tx[tx["fecha"] <= cutoff].groupby("cliente_id")["monto"].max()
print(feat.to_dict())

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Theory: validate='one_to_one' fails if cardinality is not 1:1.
Theory: left_only identifies left rows without right match (anti-join).
Theory: transform reinjects the aggregate to original shape.
Theory/iDo: leakage when post-cutoff data enters past features/metrics.
